898: export function parseDiffNameStatus(output: string): WorkspaceDiffFile[] {
899:   const tokens = output.split('\u0000').filter((token) => token.length > 0);
900: 
901:   const files: WorkspaceDiffFile[] = [];
902: 
903:   for (let index = 0; index < tokens.length; index++) {
904:     const token = tokens[index];
905:     let code = token;
906:     let firstPath: string | null = null;
907: 
908:     const tabIndex = token.indexOf('\t');
909:     if (tabIndex >= 0) {
910:       code = token.slice(0, tabIndex);
911:       const candidatePath = token.slice(tabIndex + 1);
912:       if (candidatePath.length > 0) {
913:         firstPath = candidatePath;
914:       }
915:     }
916: 
917:     if (firstPath === null) {
918:       firstPath = tokens[index + 1] ?? null;
919:       if (firstPath !== null) {
920:         index += 1;
921:       }
922:     }
923: 
924:     if (!firstPath) {
925:       continue;
926:     }
927: 
928:     if (code.startsWith('R') || code.startsWith('C')) {
929:       let secondPath: string | null = tokens[index + 1] ?? null;
930:       if (secondPath !== null) {
931:         index += 1;
932:       }
933: 
934:       if (!secondPath && firstPath.includes('\t')) {
935:         const renameSplit = firstPath.indexOf('\t');
936:         secondPath = firstPath.slice(renameSplit + 1);
937:         firstPath = firstPath.slice(0, renameSplit);
938:       }
939: 
940:       if (!secondPath) {
941:         continue;
942:       }
943: 
944:       files.push({ status: 'renamed', previousPath: firstPath, path: secondPath });
945:       continue;
946:     }
947: 
948:     if (code.startsWith('A')) {
949:       files.push({ status: 'added', path: firstPath });
950:       continue;
951:     }
952: 
953:     if (code.startsWith('D')) {
954:       files.push({ status: 'deleted', path: firstPath });
955:       continue;
956:     }
957: 
958:     files.push({ status: 'modified', path: firstPath });
959:   }
960: 
961:   return files;
962: }
963: 
964: export function trimNameStatusToCompleteRecords(output: string): string {
965:   if (!output) {
966:     return output;
967:   }
968: 
969:   const hasTrailingNull = output.endsWith('\u0000');
970:   const splitTokens = output.split('\u0000');
971:   const tokens = hasTrailingNull ? splitTokens.slice(0, -1) : splitTokens.slice(0, -1);
972:   const kept: string[] = [];
973: 
974:   for (let index = 0; index < tokens.length; ) {
975:     const statusToken = tokens[index];
976:     if (!statusToken) {
977:       index += 1;
978:       continue;
979:     }
980: 
981:     const tabIndex = statusToken.indexOf('\t');
982:     if (tabIndex >= 0) {
983:       const code = statusToken.slice(0, tabIndex);
984:       const inlinePath = statusToken.slice(tabIndex + 1);
985: 
986:       if (code.startsWith('R') || code.startsWith('C')) {
987:         if (inlinePath.includes('\t')) {
988:           kept.push(statusToken);
989:           index += 1;
990:           continue;
991:         }
992: 
993:         if (index + 1 < tokens.length) {
994:           kept.push(statusToken, tokens[index + 1]);
995:           index += 2;
996:           continue;
997:         }
998: 
999:         break;
1000:       }
1001: 
1002:       if (inlinePath.length > 0) {
1003:         kept.push(statusToken);
1004:         index += 1;
1005:         continue;
1006:       }
1007: 
1008:       if (index + 1 < tokens.length) {
1009:         kept.push(statusToken, tokens[index + 1]);
1010:         index += 2;
1011:         continue;
1012:       }
1013: 
1014:       break;
1015:     }
1016: 
1017:     if (statusToken.startsWith('R') || statusToken.startsWith('C')) {
1018:       if (index + 2 < tokens.length) {
1019:         kept.push(statusToken, tokens[index + 1], tokens[index + 2]);
1020:         index += 3;
1021:         continue;
1022:       }
1023: 
1024:       break;
1025:     }
1026: 
1027:     if (index + 1 < tokens.length) {
1028:       kept.push(statusToken, tokens[index + 1]);
1029:       index += 2;
1030:       continue;
1031:     }
1032: 
1033:     break;
1034:   }
1035: 
1036:   if (kept.length === 0) {
1037:     return '';
1038:   }
1039: 
1040:   return `${kept.join('\u0000')}\u0000`;
1041: }

1043: export function truncateChangedFilesByBytes(changedFiles: WorkspaceDiffFile[], maxBytes: number): TruncatedChangedFiles {
1044:   const encoder = new TextEncoder();
1045:   const fullJson = JSON.stringify(changedFiles);
1046:   const fullBytes = encoder.encode(fullJson).byteLength;
1047: 
1048:   if (fullBytes <= maxBytes) {
1049:     return {
1050:       files: changedFiles,
1051:       truncated: false,
1052:       bytes: fullBytes,
1053:       totalBytes: fullBytes,
1054:     };
1055:   }
1056: 
1057:   const kept: WorkspaceDiffFile[] = [];
1058:   for (const file of changedFiles) {
1059:     kept.push(file);
1060:     const candidateBytes = encoder.encode(JSON.stringify(kept)).byteLength;
1061:     if (candidateBytes > maxBytes) {
1062:       kept.pop();
1063:       break;
1064:     }
1065:   }
1066: 
1067:   return {
1068:     files: kept,
1069:     truncated: true,
1070:     bytes: encoder.encode(JSON.stringify(kept)).byteLength,
1071:     totalBytes: fullBytes,
1072:   };
1073: }

1075: export function truncateUtf8(
1076:   input: string,
1077:   maxBytes: number
1078: ): { content: string; truncated: boolean; totalBytes: number; returnedBytes: number } {
1079:   const encoder = new TextEncoder();
1080:   const decoder = new TextDecoder();
1081:   const bytes = encoder.encode(input);
1082: 
1083:   if (bytes.byteLength <= maxBytes) {
1084:     return { content: input, truncated: false, totalBytes: bytes.byteLength, returnedBytes: bytes.byteLength };
1085:   }
1086: 
1087:   const strictDecoder = new TextDecoder('utf-8', { fatal: true, ignoreBOM: false });
1088:   let end = maxBytes;
1089:   while (end > 0) {
1090:     try {
1091:       strictDecoder.decode(bytes.subarray(0, end));
1092:       break;
1093:     } catch {
1094:       end -= 1;
1095:     }
1096:   }
1097: 
1098:   return {
1099:     content: decoder.decode(bytes.subarray(0, end)),
1100:     truncated: true,
1101:     totalBytes: bytes.byteLength,
1102:     returnedBytes: end,
1103:   };
1104: }

1158:

1206: async function processWorkspaceOperationIfQueued(
1207:   env: Env,
1208:   workspace: WorkspaceResponse,
1209:   operationId: string,
1210:   type: WorkspaceOperationType,
1211:   requestPayload: Record<string, unknown>
1212: ): Promise<void> {
1213:   const claimed = await claimWorkspaceOperationForExecution(env.DB, workspace.id, operationId);
1214:   if (!claimed) {
1215:     return;
1216:   }
1217: 
1218:   let partialForkContext: Record<string, unknown> | null = null;
1219: 
1220:   try {
1221:     if (type === 'fork_github') {
1222:       const payload = parseForkGithubPayload(requestPayload);
1223:       enforceForkTargetPolicy(env, payload.target.owner);
1224: 
1225:       const appJwt = await createGitHubAppJwt(env);
1226:       const installationId = await resolveGitHubInstallationId(
1227:         env,
1228:         appJwt,
1229:         payload.target.owner,
1230:         payload.target.repo,
1231:         payload.installationId
1232:       );
1233:       const installationToken = await createInstallationToken(env, appJwt, installationId);
1234: 
1235:       const repoInfo = await githubRequest<{ default_branch: string }>(
1236:         env,
1237:         `/repos/${payload.target.owner}/${payload.target.repo}`,
1238:         { token: installationToken }
1239:       );
1240: 
1241:       await githubRequest(
1242:         env,
1243:         `/repos/${payload.target.owner}/${payload.target.repo}/git/commits/${workspace.commitSha}`,
1244:         { token: installationToken }
1245:       );
1246: 
1247:       const defaultRef = await githubRequest<{ object: { sha: string } }>(
1248:         env,
1249:         `/repos/${payload.target.owner}/${payload.target.repo}/git/ref/heads/${encodeURIComponent(repoInfo.default_branch)}`,
1250:         { token: installationToken }
1251:       );
1252: 
1253:       const warnings: Array<Record<string, unknown>> = [];
1254:       if (defaultRef.object.sha !== workspace.commitSha) {
1255:         warnings.push({
1256:           code: 'baseline_stale',
1257:           message: 'Forked from workspace baseline while target default branch has moved',
1258:           details: {
1259:             baselineSha: workspace.commitSha,
1260:             defaultBranch: repoInfo.default_branch,
1261:             defaultBranchHeadSha: defaultRef.object.sha,
1262:           },
1263:         });
1264:       }
1265: 
1266:       const sandbox = await getWorkspaceSandbox(env, workspace.sandboxId);
1267:       if (!(await workspaceHasGitHead(sandbox))) {
1268:         throw new OperationPreflightError('baseline_missing', 'Workspace git baseline is missing');
1269:       }
1270: 
1271:       const oversizedFiles = await listOversizedWorkspaceFiles(sandbox, 100 * 1024 * 1024);
1272:       if (oversizedFiles.length > 0) {
1273:         throw new OperationPreflightError('file_too_large_for_github', 'Workspace contains files over GitHub blob limit', {
1274:           files: oversizedFiles,
1275:         });
1276:       }
1277: 
1278:       const secretMatches = await detectPotentialSecrets(sandbox);
1279:       if (secretMatches.length > 0) {
1280:         const shouldBlock = (env.BLOCK_ON_SECRET_MATCH ?? 'false').toLowerCase() === 'true';
1281:         if (shouldBlock) {
1282:           throw new OperationPreflightError('secret_match_blocked', 'Potential secrets detected in workspace', {
1283:             files: secretMatches,
1284:           });
1285:         }
1286:         warnings.push({
1287:           code: 'secret_match',
1288:           message: `Potential secret patterns detected in ${secretMatches.length} files`,
1289:           details: { files: secretMatches },
1290:         });
1291:       }
1292: 
1293:       const hasChanges = await workspaceHasChanges(sandbox);
1294:       if (!hasChanges) {
1295:         throw new OperationPreflightError('no_changes', 'Workspace has no changes to fork');
1296:       }
1297: 
1298:       const resolvedBranch = await resolveBranchForFork(
1299:         env,
1300:         installationToken,
1301:         payload.target.owner,
1302:         payload.target.repo,
1303:         payload.target.branch,
1304:         workspace.id
1305:       );
1306: 
1307:       partialForkContext = {
1308:         target: {
1309:           owner: payload.target.owner,
1310:           repo: payload.target.repo,
1311:           branch: resolvedBranch.branch,
1312:         },
1313:       };
1314: 
1315:       await githubRequest(
1316:         env,
1317:         `/repos/${payload.target.owner}/${payload.target.repo}/git/refs`,
1318:         {
1319:           method: 'POST',
1320:           token: installationToken,
1321:           body: {
1322:             ref: `refs/heads/${resolvedBranch.branch}`,
1323:             sha: workspace.commitSha,
1324:           },
1325:         }
1326:       );
1327: 
1328:       partialForkContext = {
1329:         ...partialForkContext,
1330:         branchCreated: true,
1331:         branchRef: `refs/heads/${resolvedBranch.branch}`,
1332:       };
1333: 
1334:       const commitMessage =
1335:         payload.commit?.message?.trim() || `Apply Nimbus workspace ${workspace.id} changes from ${workspace.commitSha}`;
1336:       const commitSha = await executeForkCommitAndPushInSandbox(sandbox, {
1337:         owner: payload.target.owner,
1338:         repo: payload.target.repo,
1339:         token: installationToken,
1340:         baselineSha: workspace.commitSha,
1341:         branch: resolvedBranch.branch,
1342:         commitMessage,
1343:       });
1344: 
1345:       await updateWorkspaceOperationStatus(env.DB, operationId, 'succeeded', {
1346:         warnings,
1347:         result: {
1348:           target: {
1349:             owner: payload.target.owner,
1350:             repo: payload.target.repo,
1351:             branch: resolvedBranch.branch,
1352:           },
1353:           branchRef: `refs/heads/${resolvedBranch.branch}`,
1354:           commitSha,
1355:           repoUrl: `https://github.com/${payload.target.owner}/${payload.target.repo}`,
1356:           compareUrl: `https://github.com/${payload.target.owner}/${payload.target.repo}/compare/${encodeURIComponent(
1357:             repoInfo.default_branch
1358:           )}...${encodeURIComponent(resolvedBranch.branch)}`,
1359:         },
1360:       });
1361:       return;
1362:     }
1363: 
1364:     const artifactsBucket = getArtifactsBucket(env);
1365:     if (!artifactsBucket) {
1366:       throw new Error('No artifact bucket is configured (WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS or SOURCE_BUNDLES)');
1367:     }
1368: 
1369:     const sandbox = await getWorkspaceSandbox(env, workspace.sandboxId);
1370:     if (type === 'export_patch' && !(await workspaceHasGitHead(sandbox))) {
1371:       throw new Error('Workspace git baseline is missing');
1372:     }
1373: 
1374:     let contentType = 'text/plain';
1375:     let extension = 'txt';
1376:     let bytes: Uint8Array<ArrayBufferLike> = new Uint8Array(0);
1377:     let warnings: Array<Record<string, unknown>> = [];
1378:     const metadata: Record<string, unknown> = {};
1379: 
1380:     if (type === 'export_patch') {
1381:       const content = await runWorkspaceDiffAgainstHead(sandbox, '');
1382:       bytes = new TextEncoder().encode(content);
1383:       contentType = 'text/x-diff';
1384:       extension = 'patch';
1385: 
1386:       const binaryNumstat = await runWorkspaceDiffAgainstHead(sandbox, '--numstat -z');
1387:       const binaryFiles: string[] = [];
1388:       const tokens = binaryNumstat.split('\u0000').filter((token) => token.length > 0);
1389:       for (const token of tokens) {
1390:         const parts = token.split('\t');
1391:         if (parts.length === 3 && parts[0] === '-' && parts[1] === '-') {
1392:           binaryFiles.push(parts[2]);
1393:         }
1394:       }
1395:       if (binaryFiles.length > 0) {
1396:         warnings.push({
1397:           code: 'binary_excluded',
1398:           message: `${binaryFiles.length} binary files excluded from patch`,
1399:           details: { files: binaryFiles },
1400:         });
1401:       }
1402:       metadata.binaryExcludedCount = binaryFiles.length;
1403:     } else {
1404:       const zipBase64 = await exportWorkspaceZipBase64(sandbox);
1405:       bytes = fromBase64(zipBase64);
1406:       contentType = 'application/zip';
1407:       extension = 'zip';
1408:       metadata.includesGitMetadata = false;
1409:     }
1410: 
1411:     const sha = await sha256Hex(bytes);
1412:     const artifactId = generateWorkspaceArtifactId();
1413:     const objectKey = `workspaces/${workspace.id}/artifacts/${artifactId}.${extension}`;
1414:     await artifactsBucket.put(objectKey, bytes, {
1415:       httpMetadata: {
1416:         contentType,
1417:       },
1418:       customMetadata: {
1419:         workspace_id: workspace.id,
1420:         operation_id: operationId,
1421:         artifact_type: type === 'export_patch' ? 'patch' : 'zip',
1422:       },
1423:     });
1424: 
1425:     const retentionMs = 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000;
1426:     const expiresAt = new Date(Date.now() + retentionMs).toISOString();
1427:     await createWorkspaceArtifact(env.DB, {
1428:       id: artifactId,
1429:       workspaceId: workspace.id,
1430:       operationId,
1431:       type: type === 'export_patch' ? 'patch' : 'zip',
1432:       objectKey,
1433:       bytes: bytes.byteLength,
1434:       contentType,
1435:       sha256: sha,
1436:       sourceBaselineSha: workspace.commitSha,
1437:       retentionExpiresAt: expiresAt,
1438:       warnings,
1439:       metadata,
1440:     });
1441: 
1442:     await updateWorkspaceOperationStatus(env.DB, operationId, 'succeeded', {
1443:       result: { artifactId },
1444:       warnings,
1445:     });
1446:   } catch (error) {
1447:     if (error instanceof OperationPreflightError) {
1448:       await updateWorkspaceOperationStatus(env.DB, operationId, 'failed', {
1449:         errorCode: error.code,
1450:         errorClass: 'preflight_error',
1451:         errorMessage: error.message,
1452:         errorDetails: {
1453:           ...(error.details ?? {}),
1454:           ...(partialForkContext ? { partial: partialForkContext } : {}),
1455:         },
1456:       });
1457:       return;
1458:     }
1459: 
1460:     const message = sanitizeErrorMessage(error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error));
1461:     await updateWorkspaceOperationStatus(env.DB, operationId, 'failed', {
1462:       errorCode: 'operation_failed',
1463:       errorClass: 'runtime_error',
1464:       errorMessage: message,
1465:       errorDetails: {
1466:         operationType: type,
1467:         ...(partialForkContext ? { partial: partialForkContext } : {}),
1468:       },
1469:     });
1470:   }
1471: }
1472: 
1473: async function handleCreateWorkspaceOperation(
1474:   workspaceId: string,
1475:   request: Request,
1476:   env: Env,
1477:   type: WorkspaceOperationType,
1478:   authContext?: AuthContext,
1479:   ctx?: ExecutionContext
1480: ): Promise<Response> {
1481:   try {
1482:     const accessResponse = await requireWorkspaceAccess(env, workspaceId, authContext);
1483:     if (accessResponse) {
1484:       return accessResponse;
1485:     }
1486: 
1487:     const workspace = await resolveWorkspaceOr404(env, workspaceId);
1488:     if (!workspace) {
1489:       return jsonResponse({ error: 'Workspace not found' }, 404);
1490:     }
1491:     if (workspace.status !== 'ready') {
1492:       return workspaceNotReadyResponse(workspace);
1493:     }
1494: 
1495:     const idempotencyKey = getIdempotencyKey(request);
1496:     if (!idempotencyKey) {
1497:       return jsonResponse({ error: 'Missing required Idempotency-Key header' }, 400);
1498:     }
1499: 
1500:     const payload = await parseOptionalJsonBody(request);
1501:     const payloadHash = await sha256HexFromText(JSON.stringify(payload));
1502:     const operationId = generateWorkspaceOperationId();
1503: 
1504:     const created = await createWorkspaceOperation(env.DB, {
1505:       id: operationId,
1506:       workspaceId,
1507:       type,
1508:       idempotencyKey,
1509:       requestPayload: payload,

321: function phaseFromStatus(status: JobStatus): JobPhase {
322:   switch (status) {
323:     case 'queued':
324:       return 'queued';
325:     case 'running':
326:       return 'building';
327:     case 'completed':
328:       return 'completed';
329:     case 'failed':
330:       return 'failed';
331:     case 'cancelled':
332:       return 'cancelled';
333:   }
334: }

336: /**
337:  * Generate a unique job ID
338:  */
339: function generatePrefixedId(prefix: string, length = 8): string {
340:   const chars = 'REDACTED';
341:   let id = '';
342:   for (let i = 0; i < length; i++) {
343:     id += chars[Math.floor(Math.random() * chars.length)];
344:   }
345:   return `${prefix}_${id}`;
346: }

471: function parseJsonOrFallback(value: string | null, fallback: unknown): unknown {
472:   if (!value) {
473:     return fallback;
474:   }
475: 
476:   try {
477:     return JSON.parse(value);
478:   } catch {
479:     return fallback;
480:   }
481: }
482: 
483: const GITHUB_TOKEN_PATTERN = /\bgh[psu]_[A-Za-z0-9_]{20,}\b/g;
484: const GITHUB_TOKEN_PATTERN_TEST = /\bgh[psu]_[A-Za-z0-9_]{20,}\b/;
485: 
486: function stripSensitiveTokenFields(value: unknown): unknown {
487:   if (Array.isArray(value)) {
488:     return value.map((item) => stripSensitiveTokenFields(item));
489:   }
490:   if (!value || typeof value !== 'object') {
491:     if (typeof value === 'string' && GITHUB_TOKEN_PATTERN_TEST.test(value)) {
492:       return value.replace(GITHUB_TOKEN_PATTERN, '[REDACTED_TOKEN]');
493:     }
494:     return value;
495:   }
496:   const record = value as Record<string, unknown>;
497:   return Object.entries(record).reduce<Record<string, unknown>>((result, [key, nested]) => {
498:     const normalizedKey = key.toLowerCase();
499:     if (
500:       normalizedKey === 'x-review-github-token' ||
501:       normalizedKey === 'review_context_github_token' ||
502:       normalizedKey === 'authorization'
503:     ) {
504:       return result;
505:     }
506:     result[key] = stripSensitiveTokenFields(nested);
507:     return result;
508:   }, {});
509: }

511: function toWorkspaceOperationResponse(record: WorkspaceOperationRecord): WorkspaceOperationResponse {
512:   const warnings = parseJsonOrFallback(record.warnings_json, []);

514:   const errorDetails = parseJsonOrFallback(record.error_details_json, undefined);
515: 
516:   const response: WorkspaceOperationResponse = {
517:     id: record.id,
518:     type: record.type,
519:     status: record.status,
520:     workspaceId: record.workspace_id,
521:     idempotencyKey: record.idempotency_key,
522:     createdAt: record.created_at,
523:     updatedAt: record.updated_at,
524:   };
525: 
526:   if (result !== undefined) {
527:     response.result = result;
528:   }
529:   if (Array.isArray(warnings) && warnings.length > 0) {
530:     response.warnings = warnings;
531:   }
532:   if (record.error_code && record.error_message) {
533:     response.error = {
534:       code: record.error_code,
535:       message: record.error_message,
536:       details: errorDetails,
537:     };
538:   }
539: 
540:   return response;
541: }

643: function toReviewFindingRecord(value: unknown): ReviewFinding[] {
644:   if (!Array.isArray(value)) {
645:     return [];
646:   }
647: 
648:   // Phase 2 contract: strict V2 query surfaces intentionally exclude legacy finding shapes.
649:   // We do not attempt semantic V1->V2 conversion at read time because legacy reports were
650:   // generated without full ReviewContext and are not trustworthy for canonical V2 semantics.
651:   return value.flatMap((item) => {
652:     const record = item && typeof item === 'object' && !Array.isArray(item) ? (item as Record<string, unknown>) : null;
653:     if (!record) {
654:       return [];
655:     }
656: 
657:     const severity = typeof record.severity === 'string' ? record.severity.trim() : '';
658:     const category = typeof record.category === 'string' ? record.category.trim() : '';
659:     const passType = typeof record.passType === 'string' ? record.passType.trim() : '';
660:     const description = typeof record.description === 'string' ? record.description.trim() : '';
661:     const suggestedFix = typeof record.suggestedFix === 'string' ? record.suggestedFix.trim() : '';
662:     if (!severity || !category || !passType || !description) {
663:       return [];
664:     }
665: 
666:     if (!['info', 'low', 'medium', 'high', 'critical'].includes(severity)) {
667:       return [];
668:     }
669:     if (!['security', 'logic', 'style', 'breaking-change'].includes(category)) {
670:       return [];
671:     }
672:     if (passType !== 'single') {
673:       return [];
674:     }
675: 
676:     const locationsRaw = Array.isArray(record.locations) ? record.locations : [];
677:     const locations = locationsRaw.flatMap((locationItem) => {
678:       const location =
679:         locationItem && typeof locationItem === 'object' && !Array.isArray(locationItem)
680:           ? (locationItem as Record<string, unknown>)
681:           : null;
682:       if (!location) {
683:         return [];
684:       }
685: 
686:       const filePath = typeof location.filePath === 'string' ? location.filePath.trim() : '';
687:       if (!filePath) {
688:         return [];
689:       }
690:       const startLine = location.startLine;
691:       const endLine = location.endLine;
692:       const nullRange = startLine === null && endLine === null;
693:       const numericRange =
694:         typeof startLine === 'number' &&
695:         Number.isInteger(startLine) &&
696:         startLine > 0 &&
697:         typeof endLine === 'number' &&
698:         Number.isInteger(endLine) &&
699:         endLine >= startLine;
700:       if (!nullRange && !numericRange) {
701:         return [];
702:       }
703: 
704:       return [
705:         {
706:           filePath,
707:           startLine: nullRange ? null : (startLine as number),
708:           endLine: nullRange ? null : (endLine as number),
709:         },
710:       ];
711:     });
712: 
713:     if (locations.length === 0) {
714:       return [];
715:     }
716: 
717:     return [
718:       {
719:         severity: severity as ReviewFinding['severity'],
720:         category: category as ReviewFinding['category'],
721:         passType: passType as ReviewFinding['passType'],
722:         locations,
723:         description,
724:         suggestedFix,
725:       },
726:     ];
727:   });
728: }

730: function toReviewRunResponse(record: ReviewRunRecord): ReviewRunResponse {
731:   const provenance = parseJsonOrFallback(record.provenance_json, {});
732:   const report = parseJsonOrFallback(record.report_json, null) as ReviewReport | null;
733:   const reportHasProvenance = Boolean(report?.provenance);
734: 
735:   const response: ReviewRunResponse = {
736:     id: record.id,
737:     workspaceId: record.workspace_id,
738:     deploymentId: record.deployment_id,
739:     target: {
740:       type: record.target_type,
741:       workspaceId: record.workspace_id,
742:       deploymentId: record.deployment_id,
743:     },
744:     mode: record.mode,
745:     status: record.status,
746:     idempotencyKey: record.idempotency_key,
747:     attemptCount: record.attempt_count,
748:     startedAt: record.started_at,
749:     finishedAt: record.finished_at,
750:     createdAt: record.created_at,
751:     updatedAt: record.updated_at,
752:     findings: toReviewFindingRecord(report?.findings),
753:     evidence: Array.isArray(report?.evidence) ? report.evidence : [],
754:     provenance: {
755:       sessionIds:
756:         report?.provenance && Array.isArray(report.provenance.sessionIds) ? report.provenance.sessionIds : [],
757:       promptSummary:
758:         report?.provenance && typeof report.provenance.promptSummary === 'string'
759:           ? report.provenance.promptSummary
760:           : !reportHasProvenance && typeof (provenance as Record<string, unknown>).promptSummary === 'string'
761:             ? ((provenance as Record<string, unknown>).promptSummary as string)
762:             : null,
763:       transcriptUrl:
764:         report?.provenance && typeof report.provenance.transcriptUrl === 'string'
765:           ? report.provenance.transcriptUrl
766:           : null,
767:       reviewContextRef:
768:         report?.provenance && report.provenance.reviewContextRef && typeof report.provenance.reviewContextRef === 'object'
769:           ? (report.provenance.reviewContextRef as ReviewContextRef)
770:           : null,
771:       reviewContextStats:
772:         report?.provenance && report.provenance.reviewContextStats && typeof report.provenance.reviewContextStats === 'object'
773:           ? report.provenance.reviewContextStats
774:           : undefined,
775:       coChange:
776:         report?.provenance && report.provenance.coChange && typeof report.provenance.coChange === 'object'
777:           ? report.provenance.coChange
778:           : undefined,
779:       contextResolution:
780:         report?.provenance && report.provenance.contextResolution && typeof report.provenance.contextResolution === 'object'
781:           ? report.provenance.contextResolution
782:           : undefined,
783:       outputSchemaVersion: report?.provenance?.outputSchemaVersion,
784:       passArchitecture: report?.provenance?.passArchitecture,
785:       validation:
786:         report?.provenance && report.provenance.validation && typeof report.provenance.validation === 'object'
787:           ? report.provenance.validation
788:           : undefined,
789:       furtherPassesLowYield:
790:         report?.provenance && report.provenance.furtherPassesLowYield && typeof report.provenance.furtherPassesLowYield === 'object'
791:           ? report.provenance.furtherPassesLowYield
792:           : undefined,
793:       advisories:
794:         report?.provenance && Array.isArray(report.provenance.advisories)
795:           ? report.provenance.advisories.filter((item): item is string => typeof item === 'string')
796:           : undefined,
797:     },
798:     markdownSummary: record.markdown_summary,
799:   };
800: 
801:   if (report?.summary) {
802:     response.summary = report.summary;
803:   }
804:   if (typeof report?.summaryText === 'string') {
805:     response.summaryText = report.summaryText;
806:   }
807:   if (typeof report?.furtherPassesLowYield === 'boolean') {
808:     response.furtherPassesLowYield = report.furtherPassesLowYield;
809:   }
810:   if (report?.intent) {
811:     response.intent = report.intent;
812:   }
813:   if (record.error_code && record.error_message) {
814:     response.error = {
815:       code: record.error_code,
816:       message: record.error_message,
817:     };
818:   }
819: 
820:   return response;
821: }

909: /**
910:  * Atomically claim a queued checkpoint job for execution.
911:  * Returns true when claim succeeds, false when another worker already claimed.
912:  */
913: export async function claimQueuedCheckpointJob(db: D1Database, id: string): Promise<boolean> {
914:   const result = await db
915:     .prepare(
916:       `UPDATE jobs
917:        SET status = 'running',
918:            phase = 'building',
919:            started_at = ?,
920:            error_message = NULL,
921:            error_code = NULL
922:        WHERE id = ? AND status = 'queued'`

924:     .bind(new Date().toISOString(), id)
925:     .run();
926: 
927:   const changes = Number((result as { meta?: { changes?: number } }).meta?.changes ?? 0);

931: /**
932:  * Append a sequenced job event and return its sequence number.
933:  */
934: export async function appendJobEvent(
935:   db: D1Database,
936:   input: {
937:     jobId: string;
938:     attemptNo?: number;
939:     eventType: string;
940:     phase: JobPhase;
941:     payload: unknown;
942:   }
943: ): Promise<number> {
944:   const sequenceResult = await db
945:     .prepare('UPDATE jobs SET last_event_seq = last_event_seq + 1 WHERE id = ? RETURNING last_event_seq')
946:     .bind(input.jobId)
947:     .first<{ last_event_seq: number }>();
948: 
949:   if (!sequenceResult) {
950:     throw new Error(`Failed to allocate event sequence for job ${input.jobId}`);
951:   }
952: 
953:   const seq = Number(sequenceResult.last_event_seq);
954:   await db
955:     .prepare(
956:       `INSERT INTO job_events (job_id, attempt_no, seq, event_type, phase, payload_json)
957:        VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`
958:     )
959:     .bind(
960:       input.jobId,
961:       input.attemptNo ?? 0,
962:       seq,
963:       input.eventType,
964:       input.phase,
965:       JSON.stringify(input.payload)
966:     )
967:     .run();
968: 
969:   return seq;
970: }

975: export async function listJobEvents(

978:   fromExclusive = 0,
979:   limit = 500
980: ): Promise<JobEventItem[]> {
981:   const result = await db
982:     .prepare(
983:       `SELECT id, job_id, attempt_no, seq, event_type, phase, payload_json, created_at
984:        FROM job_events
985:        WHERE job_id = ? AND seq > ?
986:        ORDER BY seq ASC
987:        LIMIT ?`
988:     )
989:     .bind(jobId, fromExclusive, limit)
990:     .all<JobEventRecord>();
991: 
992:   return result.results.map((row) => {
993:     let payload: unknown;
994:     try {
995:       payload = JSON.parse(row.payload_json);
996:     } catch {
997:       payload = { raw: row.payload_json };
998:     }
999: 
1000:     return {
1001:       seq: row.seq,
1002:       eventType: row.event_type,
1003:       phase: row.phase,
1004:       payload,
1005:       createdAt: row.created_at,
1006:     };
1007:   });
1008: }

1046: 
1047:   if (additionalFields) {
1048:     if (additionalFields.phase !== undefined) {
1049:       updates.push('phase = ?');
1050:       values.push(additionalFields.phase);
1051:     }
1052:     if (additionalFields.started_at !== undefined) {
1053:       updates.push('started_at = ?');
1054:       values.push(additionalFields.started_at);
1055:     }
1056:     if (additionalFields.completed_at !== undefined) {
1057:       updates.push('completed_at = ?');

1059:     }
1060:     if (additionalFields.cancel_requested_at !== undefined) {
1061:       updates.push('cancel_requested_at = ?');
1062:       values.push(additionalFields.cancel_requested_at);
1063:     }
1064:     if (additionalFields.cancelled_at !== undefined) {
1065:       updates.push('cancelled_at = ?');
1066:       values.push(additionalFields.cancelled_at);
1067:     }
1068:     if (additionalFields.preview_url !== undefined) {
1069:       updates.push('preview_url = ?');
1070:       values.push(additionalFields.preview_url);
1071:     }
1072:     if (additionalFields.deployed_url !== undefined) {
1073:       updates.push('deployed_url = ?');
1074:       values.push(additionalFields.deployed_url);
1075:     }
1076:     if (additionalFields.code_url !== undefined) {
1077:       updates.push('code_url = ?');
1078:       values.push(additionalFields.code_url);
1079:     }
1080:     if (additionalFields.code_zip_url !== undefined) {
1081:       updates.push('code_zip_url = ?');
1082:       values.push(additionalFields.code_zip_url);
1083:     }
1084:     if (additionalFields.error_message !== undefined) {
1085:       updates.push('error_message = ?');
1086:       values.push(additionalFields.error_message);
1087:     }
1088:     if (additionalFields.error_code !== undefined) {
1089:       updates.push('error_code = ?');
1090:       values.push(additionalFields.error_code);
1091:     }
1092:     if (additionalFields.retry_count !== undefined) {
1093:       updates.push('retry_count = ?');
1094:       values.push(additionalFields.retry_count);
1095:     }
1096:     if (additionalFields.file_count !== undefined) {
1097:       updates.push('file_count = ?');
1098:       values.push(additionalFields.file_count);
1099:     }
1100:     // Metrics fields
1101:     if (additionalFields.prompt_tokens !== undefined) {
1102:       updates.push('prompt_tokens = ?');
1103:       values.push(additionalFields.prompt_tokens);
1104:     }
1105:     if (additionalFields.completion_tokens !== undefined) {
1106:       updates.push('completion_tokens = ?');
1107:       values.push(additionalFields.completion_tokens);
1108:     }
1109:     if (additionalFields.total_tokens !== undefined) {
1110:       updates.push('total_tokens = ?');
1111:       values.push(additionalFields.total_tokens);
1112:     }
1113:     if (additionalFields.cost !== undefined) {
1114:       updates.push('cost = ?');
1115:       values.push(additionalFields.cost);
1116:     }
1117:     if (additionalFields.llm_latency_ms !== undefined) {
1118:       updates.push('llm_latency_ms = ?');
1119:       values.push(additionalFields.llm_latency_ms);
1120:     }
1121:     if (additionalFields.install_duration_ms !== undefined) {
1122:       updates.push('install_duration_ms = ?');
1123:       values.push(additionalFields.install_duration_ms);
1124:     }
1125:     if (additionalFields.build_duration_ms !== undefined) {

1130:       updates.push('deploy_duration_ms = ?');

1133:     if (additionalFields.total_duration_ms !== undefined) {
1134:       updates.push('total_duration_ms = ?');
1135:       values.push(additionalFields.total_duration_ms);
1136:     }
1137:     if (additionalFields.lines_of_code !== undefined) {
1138:       updates.push('lines_of_code = ?');
1139:       values.push(additionalFields.lines_of_code);
1140:     }
1141:   }
1142: 
1143:   values.push(id);
1144: 
1145:   await db
1146:     .prepare(`UPDATE jobs SET ${updates.join(', ')} WHERE id = ?`)
1147:     .bind(...values)
1148:     .run();

1237: /**

1240: export async function updateWorkspaceStatus(

1242:   id: string,
1243:   status: WorkspaceStatus,

1245:     baseline_ready?: number;
1246:     deleted_at?: string | null;
1247:     error_code?: string | null;
1248:     error_message?: string | null;
1249:   },
1250:   options?: {
1251:     ifNotDeleted?: boolean;
1252:   }
1253: ): Promise<boolean> {
1254:   const updates: string[] = ['status = ?', 'updated_at = ?'];
1255:   const values: (string | number | null)[] = [status, new Date().toISOString()];
1256: 
1257:   if (additionalFields) {
1258:     if (additionalFields.baseline_ready !== undefined) {
1259:       updates.push('baseline_ready = ?');
1260:       values.push(additionalFields.baseline_ready);
1261:     }
1262:     if (additionalFields.deleted_at !== undefined) {
1263:       updates.push('deleted_at = ?');
1264:       values.push(additionalFields.deleted_at);
1265:     }
1266:     if (additionalFields.error_code !== undefined) {
1267:       updates.push('error_code = ?');
1268:       values.push(additionalFields.error_code);
1269:     }
1270:     if (additionalFields.error_message !== undefined) {
1271:       updates.push('error_message = ?');
1272:       values.push(additionalFields.error_message);
1273:     }
1274:   }
1275: 
1276:   values.push(id);
1277: 
1278:   let whereClause = 'id = ?';
1279:   if (options?.ifNotDeleted) {
1280:     whereClause += " AND status != 'deleted'";
1281:   }
1282: 
1283:   const result = await db
1284:     .prepare(`UPDATE workspaces SET ${updates.join(', ')} WHERE ${whereClause}`)
1285:     .bind(...values)
1286:     .run();
1287: 
1288:   return Number(result.meta.changes ?? 0) > 0;
1289: }

1407: export async function createWorkspaceOperation(
1408:   db: D1Database,
1409:   input: CreateWorkspaceOperationInput
1410: ): Promise<{ operation: WorkspaceOperationResponse; reused: boolean }> {
1411:   const now = new Date().toISOString();
1412:   const existingIdempotency = await db
1413:     .prepare(
1414:       `SELECT operation_id, request_payload_sha256, expires_at
1415:        FROM workspace_operation_idempotency
1416:        WHERE workspace_id = ? AND operation_type = ? AND idempotency_key = ?
1417:        LIMIT 1`
1418:     )
1419:     .bind(input.workspaceId, input.type, input.idempotencyKey)
1420:     .first<{ operation_id: string; request_payload_sha256: string; expires_at: string }>();
1421: 
1422:   if (existingIdempotency && existingIdempotency.expires_at > now) {
1423:     if (existingIdempotency.request_payload_sha256 !== input.requestPayloadSha256) {
1424:       throw new WorkspaceIdempotencyConflictError(input.idempotencyKey, input.type);
1425:     }
1426: 
1427:     const existingOperation = await getWorkspaceOperation(db, input.workspaceId, existingIdempotency.operation_id);
1428:     if (!existingOperation) {
1429:       throw new Error(`Idempotency record references missing operation ${existingIdempotency.operation_id}`);
1430:     }
1431:     return { operation: existingOperation, reused: true };
1432:   }
1433: 
1434:   if (existingIdempotency && existingIdempotency.expires_at <= now) {
1435:     await db
1436:       .prepare(
1437:         `DELETE FROM workspace_operation_idempotency
1438:          WHERE workspace_id = ? AND operation_type = ? AND idempotency_key = ?`
1439:       )
1440:       .bind(input.workspaceId, input.type, input.idempotencyKey)
1441:       .run();
1442:   }
1443: 
1444:   const expiresAt = new Date(Date.now() + 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();
1445:   const operationId = input.id;
1446: 
1447:   const operationRecord = await db
1448:     .prepare(
1449:       `INSERT INTO workspace_operations (
1450:          id,
1451:          workspace_id,
1452:          type,
1453:          status,
1454:          actor_id,
1455:          auth_principal_json,
1456:          request_payload_json,
1457:          request_payload_sha256,
1458:          idempotency_key,
1459:          warnings_json

1493:       )
1494:       .bind(
1495:         generatePrefixedId('wopk'),
1496:         input.workspaceId,
1497:         input.type,
1498:         input.idempotencyKey,
1499:         operationId,

1510:     const concurrentIdempotency = await db

1521:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_operations WHERE id = ?').bind(operationId).run();

1523:     }
1524:     if (concurrentIdempotency.request_payload_sha256 !== input.requestPayloadSha256) {

1529:     const existingOperation = await getWorkspaceOperation(db, input.workspaceId, concurrentIdempotency.operation_id);

1541: export async function getWorkspaceOperation(
1542:   db: D1Database,

1558: export async function claimWorkspaceOperationForExecution(
1559:   db: D1Database,
1560:   workspaceId: string,
1561:   operationId: string
1562: ): Promise<boolean> {
1563:   const startedAt = new Date().toISOString();
1564:   const result = await db
1565:     .prepare(
1566:       `UPDATE workspace_operations
1567:        SET status = 'running',
1568:            started_at = COALESCE(started_at, ?),
1569:            updated_at = ?
1570:        WHERE id = ? AND workspace_id = ? AND status = 'queued'`
1571:     )
1572:     .bind(startedAt, startedAt, operationId, workspaceId)
1573:     .run();
1574: 
1575:   return (result.meta?.changes ?? 0) > 0;
1576: }

1578: export async function updateWorkspaceOperationStatus(
1579:   db: D1Database,
1580:   operationId: string,
1581:   status: WorkspaceOperationStatus,
1582:   options?: {
1583:     result?: unknown;
1584:     warnings?: unknown[];
1585:     errorCode?: string | null;
1586:     errorClass?: string | null;
1587:     errorMessage?: string | null;
1588:     errorDetails?: unknown;
1589:     startedAt?: string | null;
1590:     finishedAt?: string | null;
1591:   }
1592: ): Promise<void> {
1593:   const updates: string[] = ['status = ?', 'updated_at = ?'];
1594:   const values: Array<string | number | null> = [status, new Date().toISOString()];
1595: 
1596:   if (options?.startedAt !== undefined) {
1597:     updates.push('started_at = ?');
1598:     values.push(options.startedAt);
1599:   }
1600:   if (options?.finishedAt !== undefined) {
1601:     updates.push('finished_at = ?');
1602:     values.push(options.finishedAt);
1603:   }
1604:   if (options?.result !== undefined) {
1605:     updates.push('result_json = ?');
1606:     values.push(JSON.stringify(options.result));
1607:   }
1608:   if (options?.warnings !== undefined) {
1609:     updates.push('warnings_json = ?');
1610:     values.push(JSON.stringify(options.warnings));
1611:   }
1612:   if (options?.errorCode !== undefined) {
1613:     updates.push('error_code = ?');
1614:     values.push(options.errorCode);
1615:   }
1616:   if (options?.errorClass !== undefined) {
1617:     updates.push('error_class = ?');
1618:     values.push(options.errorClass);
1619:   }
1620:   if (options?.errorMessage !== undefined) {
1621:     updates.push('error_message = ?');
1622:     values.push(options.errorMessage);
1623:   }
1624:   if (options?.errorDetails !== undefined) {
1625:     updates.push('error_details_json = ?');
1626:     values.push(JSON.stringify(options.errorDetails));
1627:   }
1628:   if (status === 'running') {
1629:     updates.push('started_at = COALESCE(started_at, ?)');
1630:     values.push(new Date().toISOString());
1631:   }
1632:   if (status === 'succeeded' || status === 'failed') {
1633:     updates.push('finished_at = COALESCE(finished_at, ?)');
1634:     values.push(new Date().toISOString());
1635:     updates.push('duration_ms = CASE WHEN started_at IS NULL OR COALESCE(finished_at, ?) IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CAST((julianday(COALESCE(finished_at, ?)) - julianday(started_at)) * 86400000 AS INTEGER) END');
1636:     const finishedAtForDuration = new Date().toISOString();
1637:     values.push(finishedAtForDuration, finishedAtForDuration);
1638:   }
1639: 
1640:   values.push(operationId);
1641: 
1642:   await db
1643:     .prepare(`UPDATE workspace_operations SET ${updates.join(', ')} WHERE id = ?`)
1644:     .bind(...values)
1645:     .run();
1646: }

1858: export async function handleGetWorkspaceDiff(
1859:   workspaceId: string,
1860:   request: Request,
1861:   env: Env,
1862:   authContext?: AuthContext
1863: ): Promise<Response> {
1864:   try {
1865:     const accessResponse = await requireWorkspaceAccess(env, workspaceId, authContext);
1866:     if (accessResponse) {
1867:       return accessResponse;
1868:     }
1869: 
1870:     const workspace = await resolveWorkspaceOr404(env, workspaceId);
1871:     if (!workspace) {
1872:       return jsonResponse({ error: 'Workspace not found' }, 404);
1873:     }
1874:     if (workspace.status !== 'ready') {
1875:       return workspaceNotReadyResponse(workspace);
1876:     }
1877:     if (!workspace.baselineReady) {
1878:       return jsonResponse(
1879:         {
1880:           error: 'Workspace baseline is not ready. Run workspace reset to retry baseline initialization.',
1881:           status: workspace.status,
1882:         },
1883:         409
1884:       );
1885:     }
1886: 
1887:     const url = new URL(request.url);
1888:     const includePatch = parseBooleanQueryParam(url, 'include_patch');
1889:     const maxBytes = parseMaxBytes(url, 'max_bytes', DEFAULT_DIFF_MAX_BYTES, MAX_DIFF_MAX_BYTES);
1890:     const sandbox = await getWorkspaceSandbox(env, workspace.sandboxId);
1891:     const hasHead = await workspaceHasGitHead(sandbox);
1892:     if (!hasHead) {
1893:       return jsonResponse(
1894:         {
1895:           error: 'Workspace git baseline is missing. Run workspace reset to rebuild baseline before requesting diff.',
1896:           status: workspace.status,
1897:         },
1898:         409
1899:       );
1900:     }
1901: 
1902:     const nameStatusOutput = await runWorkspaceDiffAgainstHead(sandbox, '--name-status -z', maxBytes + 1);
1903:     const nameStatusBytes = new TextEncoder().encode(nameStatusOutput).byteLength;
1904:     const nameStatusLikelyTruncated = nameStatusBytes > maxBytes;
1905:     const safeNameStatusOutput = trimNameStatusToCompleteRecords(nameStatusOutput);
1906:     const changedFiles = parseDiffNameStatus(safeNameStatusOutput);
1907: 
1908:     const summary = {
1909:       added: changedFiles.filter((file) => file.status === 'added').length,
1910:       modified: changedFiles.filter((file) => file.status === 'modified').length,
1911:       deleted: changedFiles.filter((file) => file.status === 'deleted').length,
1912:       renamed: changedFiles.filter((file) => file.status === 'renamed').length,
1913:       totalChanged: changedFiles.length,
1914:     };
1915: 
1916:     const truncatedChangedFiles = truncateChangedFilesByBytes(changedFiles, maxBytes);
1917: 
1918:     const response: Record<string, unknown> = {
1919:       workspaceId,
1920:       includePatch,
1921:       maxBytes,
1922:       truncated: nameStatusLikelyTruncated || truncatedChangedFiles.truncated,
1923:       changedFilesTruncated: nameStatusLikelyTruncated || truncatedChangedFiles.truncated,
1924:       summary,
1925:       summaryIsPartial: nameStatusLikelyTruncated,
1926:       changedFiles: truncatedChangedFiles.files,
1927:       changedFilesBytes: truncatedChangedFiles.bytes,
1928:       changedFilesTotalBytes: truncatedChangedFiles.totalBytes,
1929:     };
1930: 
1931:     if (includePatch) {
1932:       const patchOutput = await runWorkspaceDiffAgainstHead(sandbox, '', maxBytes + 1);
1933:       const truncatedPatch = truncateUtf8(patchOutput, maxBytes);
1934:       response.patch = truncatedPatch.content;
1935:       response.patchTruncated = truncatedPatch.truncated;
1936:       response.truncated = Boolean(response.truncated) || truncatedPatch.truncated;
1937:       response.patchBytes = truncatedPatch.returnedBytes;
1938:       if (!truncatedPatch.truncated) {
1939:         response.patchTotalBytes = truncatedPatch.totalBytes;
1940:       }
1941:     }
1942: 
1943:     return jsonResponse(response);
1944:   } catch (error) {
1945:     const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
1946:     return jsonResponse({ error: message }, 500);
1947:   }
1948: }

2049:               signature

2064: export async function handleDownloadWorkspaceArtifact(
2065:   workspaceId: string,
2066:   artifactId: string,
2067:   request: Request,
2068:   env: Env,
2069:   authContext?: AuthContext
2070: ): Promise<Response> {
2071:   try {
2072:     const accessResponse = await requireWorkspaceAccess(env, workspaceId, authContext);
2073:     if (accessResponse) {
2074:       return accessResponse;
2075:     }
2076: 
2077:     const workspace = await resolveWorkspaceOr404(env, workspaceId);
2078:     if (!workspace) {
2079:       return jsonResponse({ error: 'Workspace not found' }, 404);
2080:     }
2081: 
2082:     const artifact = await getWorkspaceArtifactById(env.DB, workspaceId, artifactId);
2083:     if (!artifact) {
2084:       return jsonResponse({ error: 'Artifact not found' }, 404);
2085:     }
2086: 
2087:     const downloadSecret = getArtifactDownloadSecret(env);

2090:     }
2091: 
2092:     const url = new URL(request.url);
2093:     const expRaw = url.searchParams.get('exp');
2094:     const sigRaw = url.searchParams.get('sig');
2095:     const exp = expRaw ? Number(expRaw) : NaN;
2096:     if (!Number.isFinite(exp) || !sigRaw) {
2097:       return jsonResponse({ error: 'Missing or invalid download signature' }, 403);
2098:     }
2099: 
2100:     const nowEpochSec = Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000);
2101:     if (exp < nowEpochSec) {
2102:       return jsonResponse({ error: 'Download signature expired' }, 403);
2103:     }
2104: 
2105:     const expectedSig = await signArtifactDownload(workspaceId, artifactId, exp, downloadSecret);
2106:     if (sigRaw !== expectedSig) {
2107:       return jsonResponse({ error: 'Download signature invalid' }, 403);
2108:     }
2109: 
2110:     const nowIso = new Date().toISOString();

2118:         },
2119:         410
2120:       );

2122: 
2123:     const artifactsBucket = getArtifactsBucket(env);

2127:

2129:     if (!object || !object.body) {
2130:       return jsonResponse({ error: 'Artifact object not found' }, 404);
2131:     }
2132: 
2133:     const extension = artifact.artifact.type === 'zip' ? 'zip' : 'patch';
2134:     const filename = `${artifact.artifact.id}.${extension}`;
2135:     return new Response(object.body, {
2136:       status: 200,
2137:       headers: {
2138:         ...corsHeaders,
2139:         'Content-Type': artifact.contentType,
2140:         'Content-Disposition': `attachment; filename="${filename}"`,
2141:       },

2180: export async function handleResetWorkspace(workspaceId: string, env: Env, authContext?: AuthContext): Promise<Response> {
2181:   if (!env.SOURCE_BUNDLES) {
2182:     return jsonResponse({ error: 'SOURCE_BUNDLES R2 binding is not configured' }, 500);
2183:   }
2184: 
2185:   let workspaceReadyPersisted = false;
2186:   let originalWorkspace: WorkspaceResponse | null = null;
2187:   let baselineReady = true;
2188: 
2189:   try {
2190:     const accessResponse = await requireWorkspaceAccess(env, workspaceId, authContext);
2191:     if (accessResponse) {
2192:       return accessResponse;
2193:     }
2194: 
2195:     const workspace = await getWorkspace(env.DB, workspaceId);
2196:     if (!workspace) {
2197:       return jsonResponse({ error: 'Workspace not found' }, 404);
2198:     }
2199:     originalWorkspace = workspace;
2200: 
2201:     if (workspace.status === 'deleted') {
2202:       return jsonResponse({ error: 'Workspace has been deleted' }, 409);
2203:     }
2204: 
2205:     const bundle = await env.SOURCE_BUNDLES.get(workspace.sourceBundleKey);
2206:     if (!bundle) {
2207:       return jsonResponse({ error: 'Workspace source bundle not found' }, 404);
2208:     }
2209: 
2210:     const sourceBytes = await bundle.arrayBuffer();
2211:     const sourceHash = await sha256Hex(sourceBytes);
2212:     if (sourceHash !== workspace.sourceBundleSha256) {
2213:       return jsonResponse({ error: 'Workspace source bundle checksum mismatch' }, 500);
2214:     }
2215: 
2216:     await appendWorkspaceEvent(env.DB, {
2217:       workspaceId,
2218:       eventType: 'workspace_reset_started',
2219:       payload: {},
2220:     });
2221: 
2222:     await hydrateWorkspaceFilesystem(env, workspace.sandboxId, sourceBytes);
2223:     const workspaceSandbox = await getWorkspaceSandbox(env, workspace.sandboxId);
2224:     try {
2225:       await ensureWorkspaceGitBaseline(workspaceSandbox);
2226:     } catch (error) {
2227:       baselineReady = false;
2228:       const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
2229:       try {
2230:         await appendWorkspaceEvent(env.DB, {
2231:           workspaceId,
2232:           eventType: 'workspace_git_baseline_failed',
2233:           payload: { message },
2234:         });
2235:       } catch {
2236:         // Best-effort event only.
2237:       }
2238:     }
2239:     const markedReady = await markWorkspaceReady(env.DB, workspaceId, baselineReady);
2240:     if (!markedReady) {
2241:       return jsonResponse({ error: 'Workspace can no longer transition to ready (likely deleted)' }, 409);
2242:     }
2243:     workspaceReadyPersisted = true;
2244: 
2245:     await appendWorkspaceEvent(env.DB, {
2246:       workspaceId,
2247:       eventType: 'workspace_reset_completed',
2248:       payload: {},
2249:     });
2250: 
2251:     const refreshed = await getWorkspace(env.DB, workspaceId);
2252:     return jsonResponse({ workspace: refreshed });
2253:   } catch (error) {
2254:     const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
2255: 
2256:     if (workspaceReadyPersisted) {
2257:       try {
2258:         const workspace = await getWorkspace(env.DB, workspaceId);
2259:         if (workspace) {
2260:           return jsonResponse({ workspace });
2261:         }
2262:       } catch {
2263:         // Best-effort readback only.
2264:       }
2265: 
2266:       if (originalWorkspace) {
2267:         const fallbackWorkspace: WorkspaceResponse = {
2268:           ...originalWorkspace,
2269:           status: 'ready',
2270:           baselineReady,
2271:           errorCode: null,
2272:           errorMessage: null,
2273:           updatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
2274:         };
2275:         return jsonResponse({ workspace: fallbackWorkspace, warning: `Post-ready reset bookkeeping failed: ${message}` });
2276:       }
2277: 
2278:       return jsonResponse({ error: `Reset reached ready state but result could not be loaded: ${message}` }, 500);
2279:     }
2280: 
2281:     try {
2282:       const markedFailed = await markWorkspaceFailed(env.DB, workspaceId, message, 'workspace_reset_failed');
2283:       if (!markedFailed) {
2284:         return jsonResponse({ error: 'Workspace reset failed after workspace was deleted' }, 409);
2285:       }
2286:       await appendWorkspaceEvent(env.DB, {
2287:         workspaceId,
2288:         eventType: 'workspace_reset_failed',
2289:         payload: { message },
2290:       });
2291:     } catch {
2292:       // Best-effort failure state update.
2293:     }
2294: 
2295:     return jsonResponse({ error: `Failed to reset workspace: ${message}` }, 500);
2296:   }
2297: }

2299: export async function handleDeleteWorkspace(workspaceId: string, env: Env, authContext?: AuthContext): Promise<Response> {
2300:   try {
2301:     const accessResponse = await requireWorkspaceAccess(env, workspaceId, authContext);
2302:     if (accessResponse) {
2303:       return accessResponse;
2304:     }
2305: 
2306:     const workspace = await getWorkspace(env.DB, workspaceId);
2307:     if (!workspace) {
2308:       return jsonResponse({ error: 'Workspace not found' }, 404);
2309:     }
2310: 
2311:     if (workspace.status === 'deleted') {
2312:       return jsonResponse({ workspaceId, status: 'deleted' });
2313:     }
2314: 
2315:     try {
2316:       const sandbox = await getWorkspaceSandbox(env, workspace.sandboxId);
2317:       await sandbox.destroy();
2318:     } catch (error) {
2319:       if (isSandboxAlreadyGoneError(error)) {
2320:         // Treat missing/already-destroyed sandbox as idempotent success.
2321:       } else {
2322:       const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
2323: 
2324:       try {
2325:         await markWorkspaceFailed(env.DB, workspaceId, message, 'workspace_delete_failed');
2326:         await appendWorkspaceEvent(env.DB, {
2327:           workspaceId,
2328:           eventType: 'workspace_delete_failed',
2329:           payload: { message },
2330:         });
2331:       } catch {
2332:         // Best-effort failure state update.
2333:       }
2334: 
2335:       return jsonResponse({ error: `Failed to destroy workspace sandbox: ${message}` }, 500);
2336:       }
2337:     }
2338: 
2339:     if (env.SOURCE_BUNDLES) {
2340:       try {
2341:         await env.SOURCE_BUNDLES.delete(workspace.sourceBundleKey);
2342:       } catch (error) {
2343:         const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
2344:         try {
2345:           await markWorkspaceFailed(env.DB, workspaceId, message, 'workspace_delete_partial');
2346:           await appendWorkspaceEvent(env.DB, {
2347:             workspaceId,
2348:             eventType: 'workspace_delete_partial',
2349:             payload: { message },
2350:           });
2351:         } catch {
2352:           // Best-effort status/event update for partial delete.
2353:         }
2354:         return jsonResponse({ error: `Failed to delete workspace source bundle: ${message}` }, 503);
2355:       }
2356:     }
2357: 
2358:     const markedDeleted = await markWorkspaceDeleted(env.DB, workspaceId);
2359:     if (!markedDeleted) {
2360:       return jsonResponse({ error: 'Workspace can no longer transition to deleted' }, 409);
2361:     }
2362:     try {
2363:       await appendWorkspaceEvent(env.DB, {
2364:         workspaceId,
2365:         eventType: 'workspace_deleted',
2366:         payload: {},
2367:       });
2368:     } catch {
2369:       // Deletion already persisted; event append is best-effort.
2370:     }
2371: 
2372:     return jsonResponse({ workspaceId, status: 'deleted' });
2373:   } catch (error) {
2374:     const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
2375:     return jsonResponse({ error: `Failed to delete workspace: ${message}` }, 500);
2376:   }
2377: }

1855:     if (!concurrent || concurrent.expires_at <= now) {
1856:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_tasks WHERE id = ?').bind(input.id).run();
1857:       throw new Error('Task idempotency race detected but winner record is unavailable');
1858:     }
1859: 
1860:     if (concurrent.request_payload_sha256 !== input.requestPayloadSha256) {
1861:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_tasks WHERE id = ?').bind(input.id).run();
1862:       throw new WorkspaceTaskIdempotencyConflictError(input.idempotencyKey);
1863:     }
1864: 
1865:     const existingTask = await getWorkspaceTask(db, input.workspaceId, concurrent.task_id);
1866:     if (!existingTask) {
1867:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_tasks WHERE id = ?').bind(input.id).run();
1868:       throw new Error(`Idempotency record references missing task ${concurrent.task_id}`);
1869:     }
1870: 
1871:     await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_tasks WHERE id = ?').bind(input.id).run();
1872:     return { task: existingTask, reused: true };
1873:   }
1874: 
1875:   return { task: toWorkspaceTaskResponse(taskRecord), reused: false };
1876: }

1944: export async function claimWorkspaceTaskForExecution(
1945:   db: D1Database,
1946:   workspaceId: string,
1947:   taskId: string
1948: ): Promise<boolean> {
1949:   const now = new Date().toISOString();
1950:   const result = await db
1951:     .prepare(
1952:       `UPDATE workspace_tasks
1953:        SET status = 'running',
1954:            started_at = COALESCE(started_at, ?),
1955:            attempt_count = attempt_count + 1,
1956:            updated_at = ?
1957:        WHERE id = ? AND workspace_id = ? AND status = 'queued' AND cancel_requested_at IS NULL`
1958:     )
1959:     .bind(now, now, taskId, workspaceId)
1960:     .run();
1961: 
1962:   return (result.meta?.changes ?? 0) > 0;
1963: }

1965: export async function updateWorkspaceTaskStatus(
1966:   db: D1Database,
1967:   taskId: string,
1968:   status: WorkspaceTaskStatus,
1969:   options?: {
1970:     workspaceId?: string;
1971:     result?: unknown;
1972:     errorCode?: string | null;
1973:     errorMessage?: string | null;
1974:     startedAt?: string | null;
1975:     finishedAt?: string | null;
1976:   }
1977: ): Promise<void> {
1978:   const updates: string[] = ['status = ?', 'updated_at = ?'];
1979:   const values: Array<string | null> = [status, new Date().toISOString()];
1980: 
1981:   if (options?.startedAt !== undefined) {
1982:     updates.push('started_at = ?');
1983:     values.push(options.startedAt);
1984:   }
1985: 
1986:   if (options?.finishedAt !== undefined) {
1987:     updates.push('finished_at = ?');
1988:     values.push(options.finishedAt);
1989:   }
1990: 
1991:   if (options?.result !== undefined) {
1992:     updates.push('result_json = ?');
1993:     values.push(JSON.stringify(options.result));
1994:   }
1995: 
1996:   if (options?.errorCode !== undefined) {
1997:     updates.push('error_code = ?');
1998:     values.push(options.errorCode);
1999:   }
2000: 
2001:   if (options?.errorMessage !== undefined) {
2002:     updates.push('error_message = ?');
2003:     values.push(options.errorMessage);
2004:   }
2005: 
2006:   if (status === 'succeeded' || status === 'failed' || status === 'cancelled') {
2007:     updates.push('finished_at = COALESCE(finished_at, ?)');
2008:     values.push(new Date().toISOString());
2009:   }
2010: 
2011:   values.push(taskId);
2012:   let whereClause = 'id = ?';
2013:   if (options?.workspaceId) {
2014:     whereClause += ' AND workspace_id = ?';
2015:     values.push(options.workspaceId);
2016:   }
2017: 
2018:   await db
2019:     .prepare(`UPDATE workspace_tasks SET ${updates.join(', ')} WHERE ${whereClause}`)
2020:     .bind(...values)
2021:     .run();
2022: }

2024: export async function requestWorkspaceTaskCancel(
2025:   db: D1Database,
2026:   workspaceId: string,
2027:   taskId: string
2028: ): Promise<{ task: WorkspaceTaskResponse | null; updated: boolean }> {
2029:   const now = new Date().toISOString();
2030:   const queuedResult = await db
2031:     .prepare(
2032:       `UPDATE workspace_tasks
2033:        SET status = 'cancelled',
2034:            cancel_requested_at = COALESCE(cancel_requested_at, ?),
2035:            finished_at = COALESCE(finished_at, ?),
2036:            error_code = NULL,
2037:            error_message = NULL,
2038:            updated_at = ?
2039:        WHERE id = ? AND workspace_id = ? AND status = 'queued'`
2040:     )
2041:     .bind(now, now, now, taskId, workspaceId)
2042:     .run();
2043: 
2044:   const runningResult = await db
2045:     .prepare(
2046:       `UPDATE workspace_tasks
2047:        SET cancel_requested_at = COALESCE(cancel_requested_at, ?),
2048:            updated_at = ?
2049:        WHERE id = ? AND workspace_id = ? AND status = 'running' AND cancel_requested_at IS NULL`
2050:     )
2051:     .bind(now, now, taskId, workspaceId)
2052:     .run();
2053: 
2054:   const task = await getWorkspaceTask(db, workspaceId, taskId);
2055:   return {
2056:     task,
2057:     updated: (queuedResult.meta?.changes ?? 0) > 0 || (runningResult.meta?.changes ?? 0) > 0,
2058:   };
2059: }

2061: export async function appendWorkspaceTaskEvent(
2062:   db: D1Database,
2063:   input: {
2064:     workspaceId: string;
2065:     taskId: string;
2066:     eventType: string;
2067:     payload: unknown;
2068:   }
2069: ): Promise<number> {
2070:   const seqResult = await db
2071:     .prepare(
2072:       'UPDATE workspace_tasks SET last_event_seq = last_event_seq + 1 WHERE id = ? AND workspace_id = ? RETURNING last_event_seq'
2073:     )
2074:     .bind(input.taskId, input.workspaceId)
2075:     .first<{ last_event_seq: number }>();
2076: 
2077:   if (!seqResult) {
2078:     throw new Error(`Failed to allocate event sequence for workspace task ${input.taskId}`);
2079:   }
2080: 
2081:   const seq = Number(seqResult.last_event_seq);
2082: 
2083:   await db
2084:     .prepare(
2085:       `INSERT INTO workspace_task_events (workspace_id, task_id, seq, event_type, payload_json)
2086:        VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`
2087:     )
2088:     .bind(input.workspaceId, input.taskId, seq, input.eventType, JSON.stringify(input.payload))
2089:     .run();
2090: 
2091:   return seq;
2092: }

2094: export async function listWorkspaceTaskEvents(
2095:   db: D1Database,
2096:   workspaceId: string,
2097:   taskId: string,
2098:   fromExclusive = 0,
2099:   limit = 500
2100: ): Promise<WorkspaceTaskEventItem[]> {
2101:   const result = await db
2102:     .prepare(
2103:       `SELECT seq, event_type, payload_json, created_at
2104:        FROM workspace_task_events
2105:        WHERE workspace_id = ? AND task_id = ? AND seq > ?
2106:        ORDER BY seq ASC
2107:        LIMIT ?`
2108:     )
2109:     .bind(workspaceId, taskId, fromExclusive, limit)
2110:     .all<WorkspaceTaskEventRecord>();
2111: 
2112:   return result.results.map((row) => {
2113:     let payload: unknown;
2114:     try {
2115:       payload = JSON.parse(row.payload_json);
2116:     } catch {
2117:       payload = { raw: row.payload_json };
2118:     }
2119: 
2120:     return {
2121:       seq: row.seq,
2122:       eventType: row.event_type,
2123:       payload,
2124:       createdAt: row.created_at,
2125:     };
2126:   });
2127: }

2148: export async function createWorkspaceDeployment(
2149:   db: D1Database,
2150:   input: CreateWorkspaceDeploymentInput
2151: ): Promise<{ deployment: WorkspaceDeploymentResponse; reused: boolean }> {
2152:   const now = new Date().toISOString();
2153:   const acceptedHashes = new Set([input.requestPayloadSha256, ...(input.requestPayloadSha256Aliases ?? [])]);
2154:   const existingIdempotency = await db
2155:     .prepare(
2156:       `SELECT deployment_id, request_payload_sha256, expires_at
2157:        FROM workspace_deployment_idempotency
2158:        WHERE workspace_id = ? AND idempotency_key = ?
2159:        LIMIT 1`
2160:     )
2161:     .bind(input.workspaceId, input.idempotencyKey)
2162:     .first<{ deployment_id: string; request_payload_sha256: string; expires_at: string }>();
2163: 
2164:   if (existingIdempotency && existingIdempotency.expires_at > now) {
2165:     if (!acceptedHashes.has(existingIdempotency.request_payload_sha256)) {
2166:       throw new WorkspaceDeploymentIdempotencyConflictError(input.idempotencyKey);
2167:     }
2168: 
2169:     const existingDeployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(db, input.workspaceId, existingIdempotency.deployment_id);
2170:     if (!existingDeployment) {
2171:       throw new Error(`Idempotency record references missing deployment ${existingIdempotency.deployment_id}`);
2172:     }
2173: 
2174:     return { deployment: existingDeployment, reused: true };
2175:   }
2176: 
2177:   if (existingIdempotency && existingIdempotency.expires_at <= now) {
2178:     await db
2179:       .prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_deployment_idempotency WHERE workspace_id = ? AND idempotency_key = ?')
2180:       .bind(input.workspaceId, input.idempotencyKey)
2181:       .run();
2182:   }
2183: 
2184:   const idempotencyWindowStart = new Date(Date.now() - 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();
2185:   const existingDeploymentByKey = await db
2186:     .prepare(
2187:       `SELECT *
2188:        FROM workspace_deployments
2189:        WHERE workspace_id = ?
2190:          AND idempotency_key = ?
2191:          AND julianday(created_at) >= julianday(?)
2192:        ORDER BY created_at DESC
2193:        LIMIT 1`
2194:     )
2195:     .bind(input.workspaceId, input.idempotencyKey, idempotencyWindowStart)
2196:     .first<WorkspaceDeploymentRecord>();
2197: 
2198:   if (existingDeploymentByKey) {
2199:     if (!acceptedHashes.has(existingDeploymentByKey.request_payload_sha256)) {
2200:       throw new WorkspaceDeploymentIdempotencyConflictError(input.idempotencyKey);
2201:     }
2202: 
2203:     const expiresAt = new Date(Date.now() + 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();
2204:     try {
2205:       await db
2206:         .prepare(
2207:           `INSERT INTO workspace_deployment_idempotency (
2208:              id,
2209:              workspace_id,
2210:              idempotency_key,
2211:              deployment_id,
2212:              request_payload_sha256,
2213:              expires_at
2214:            )
2215:            VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`
2216:         )
2217:         .bind(
2218:           generatePrefixedId('wdep'),
2219:           input.workspaceId,
2220:           input.idempotencyKey,
2221:           existingDeploymentByKey.id,
2222:           input.requestPayloadSha256,
2223:           expiresAt
2224:         )
2225:         .run();
2226:     } catch (error) {
2227:       if (!isUniqueConstraintError(error)) {
2228:         throw error;
2229:       }
2230:     }
2231: 
2232:     return { deployment: toWorkspaceDeploymentResponse(existingDeploymentByKey), reused: true };
2233:   }
2234: 
2235:   const expiresAt = new Date(Date.now() + 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();
2236:   const deploymentRecord = await db
2237:     .prepare(
2238:       `INSERT INTO workspace_deployments (
2239:          id,
2240:          workspace_id,
2241:          status,
2242:          provider,
2243:          idempotency_key,
2244:          request_payload_json,
2245:          request_payload_sha256,
2246:          max_retries,
2247:          provenance_json,
2248:          created_at,
2249:          updated_at
2250:        )
2251:        VALUES (?, ?, 'queued', ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
2252:        RETURNING *`
2253:     )
2254:     .bind(
2255:       input.id,
2256:       input.workspaceId,
2257:       input.provider,
2258:       input.idempotencyKey,
2259:       JSON.stringify(input.requestPayload ?? {}),
2260:       input.requestPayloadSha256,
2261:       input.maxRetries,
2262:       JSON.stringify(input.provenance ?? {}),
2263:       now,
2264:       now
2265:     )
2266:     .first<WorkspaceDeploymentRecord>();
2267: 
2268:   if (!deploymentRecord) {
2269:     throw new Error('Failed to create workspace deployment');
2270:   }
2271: 
2272:   try {
2273:     await db
2274:       .prepare(
2275:         `INSERT INTO workspace_deployment_idempotency (
2276:            id,
2277:            workspace_id,
2278:            idempotency_key,
2279:            deployment_id,
2280:            request_payload_sha256,
2281:            expires_at
2282:          )
2283:          VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`
2284:       )
2285:       .bind(
2286:         generatePrefixedId('wdep'),
2287:         input.workspaceId,
2288:         input.idempotencyKey,
2289:         input.id,
2290:         input.requestPayloadSha256,
2291:         expiresAt
2292:       )
2293:       .run();
2294:   } catch (error) {
2295:     if (!isUniqueConstraintError(error)) {
2296:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_deployments WHERE id = ?').bind(input.id).run();
2297:       throw error;
2298:     }
2299: 
2300:     const concurrent = await db
2301:       .prepare(
2302:         `SELECT deployment_id, request_payload_sha256, expires_at
2303:          FROM workspace_deployment_idempotency
2304:          WHERE workspace_id = ? AND idempotency_key = ?
2305:          LIMIT 1`
2306:       )
2307:       .bind(input.workspaceId, input.idempotencyKey)
2308:       .first<{ deployment_id: string; request_payload_sha256: string; expires_at: string }>();
2309: 
2310:     if (!concurrent || concurrent.expires_at <= now) {
2311:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_deployments WHERE id = ?').bind(input.id).run();
2312:       throw new Error('Deployment idempotency race detected but winner record is unavailable');
2313:     }
2314: 
2315:     if (!acceptedHashes.has(concurrent.request_payload_sha256)) {
2316:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_deployments WHERE id = ?').bind(input.id).run();
2317:       throw new WorkspaceDeploymentIdempotencyConflictError(input.idempotencyKey);
2318:     }
2319: 
2320:     const existingDeployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(db, input.workspaceId, concurrent.deployment_id);
2321:     if (!existingDeployment) {
2322:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_deployments WHERE id = ?').bind(input.id).run();
2323:       throw new Error(`Idempotency record references missing deployment ${concurrent.deployment_id}`);
2324:     }
2325: 
2326:     await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_deployments WHERE id = ?').bind(input.id).run();
2327:     return { deployment: existingDeployment, reused: true };
2328:   }
2329: 
2330:   return { deployment: toWorkspaceDeploymentResponse(deploymentRecord), reused: false };
2331: }

2395: export async function updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(
2396:   db: D1Database,
2397:   deploymentId: string,
2398:   status: WorkspaceDeploymentStatus,
2399:   options?: {
2400:     workspaceId?: string;
2401:     result?: unknown;
2402:     toolchain?: WorkspaceToolchainProfile | null;
2403:     dependencyCacheKey?: string | null;
2404:     dependencyCacheHit?: boolean;
2405:     remediations?: WorkspaceDeploymentRemediation[];
2406:     errorCode?: string | null;
2407:     errorMessage?: string | null;
2408:     sourceSnapshotSha256?: string | null;
2409:     sourceBundleKey?: string | null;
2410:     deployedUrl?: string | null;
2411:     providerDeploymentId?: string | null;
2412:     cancelRequestedAt?: string | null;
2413:     startedAt?: string | null;
2414:     finishedAt?: string | null;
2415:   }
2416: ): Promise<void> {
2417:   const updates: string[] = ['status = ?', 'updated_at = ?'];
2418:   const values: Array<string | number | null> = [status, new Date().toISOString()];
2419:   let explicitFinishedAt: string | null | undefined;
2420: 
2421:   if (options?.startedAt !== undefined) {
2422:     updates.push('started_at = ?');
2423:     values.push(options.startedAt);
2424:   }
2425:   if (options?.finishedAt !== undefined) {
2426:     updates.push('finished_at = ?');
2427:     values.push(options.finishedAt);
2428:     explicitFinishedAt = options.finishedAt;
2429:   }
2430:   if (options?.result !== undefined) {
2431:     updates.push('result_json = ?');
2432:     values.push(JSON.stringify(options.result));
2433:   }
2434:   if (options?.toolchain !== undefined) {
2435:     updates.push('toolchain_json = ?');
2436:     values.push(options.toolchain ? JSON.stringify(options.toolchain) : null);
2437:   }
2438:   if (options?.dependencyCacheKey !== undefined) {
2439:     updates.push('dependency_cache_key = ?');
2440:     values.push(options.dependencyCacheKey);
2441:   }
2442:   if (options?.dependencyCacheHit !== undefined) {
2443:     updates.push('dependency_cache_hit = ?');
2444:     values.push(options.dependencyCacheHit ? 1 : 0);
2445:   }
2446:   if (options?.remediations !== undefined) {
2447:     updates.push('remediations_json = ?');
2448:     values.push(JSON.stringify(options.remediations));
2449:   }
2450:   if (options?.errorCode !== undefined) {
2451:     updates.push('error_code = ?');
2452:     values.push(options.errorCode);
2453:   }
2454:   if (options?.errorMessage !== undefined) {
2455:     updates.push('error_message = ?');
2456:     values.push(options.errorMessage);
2457:   }
2458:   if (options?.sourceSnapshotSha256 !== undefined) {
2459:     updates.push('source_snapshot_sha256 = ?');
2460:     values.push(options.sourceSnapshotSha256);
2461:   }
2462:   if (options?.sourceBundleKey !== undefined) {
2463:     updates.push('source_bundle_key = ?');
2464:     values.push(options.sourceBundleKey);
2465:   }
2466:   if (options?.deployedUrl !== undefined) {
2467:     updates.push('deployed_url = ?');
2468:     values.push(options.deployedUrl);
2469:   }
2470:   if (options?.providerDeploymentId !== undefined) {
2471:     updates.push('provider_deployment_id = ?');
2472:     values.push(options.providerDeploymentId);
2473:   }
2474:   if (options?.cancelRequestedAt !== undefined) {
2475:     updates.push('cancel_requested_at = ?');
2476:     values.push(options.cancelRequestedAt);
2477:   }
2478: 
2479:   if (status === 'succeeded' || status === 'failed' || status === 'cancelled') {
2480:     const finishedAtForDuration =
2481:       explicitFinishedAt && typeof explicitFinishedAt === 'string' ? explicitFinishedAt : new Date().toISOString();
2482:     if (explicitFinishedAt === undefined) {
2483:       updates.push('finished_at = COALESCE(finished_at, ?)');
2484:       values.push(finishedAtForDuration);
2485:     }
2486:     updates.push('duration_ms = CASE WHEN started_at IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CAST((julianday(?) - julianday(started_at)) * 86400000 AS INTEGER) END');
2487:     values.push(finishedAtForDuration);
2488:   }
2489: 
2490:   values.push(deploymentId);
2491:   let whereClause = 'id = ?';
2492:   if (options?.workspaceId) {
2493:     whereClause += ' AND workspace_id = ?';
2494:     values.push(options.workspaceId);
2495:   }
2496:   if (status === 'running') {
2497:     whereClause += " AND status IN ('queued', 'running')";
2498:   }
2499: 
2500:   await db
2501:     .prepare(`UPDATE workspace_deployments SET ${updates.join(', ')} WHERE ${whereClause}`)
2502:     .bind(...values)
2503:     .run();
2504: }

2506: export async function markWorkspaceDeploymentSucceededIfNotCancelled(
2507:   db: D1Database,
2508:   input: {

2511:     sourceSnapshotSha256: string;
2512:     sourceBundleKey: string;

2514:     providerDeploymentId: string;
2515:     result: unknown;
2516:     finishedAt: string;
2517:   }
2518: ): Promise<boolean> {
2519:   const updatedAt = new Date().toISOString();
2520:   const result = await db
2521:     .prepare(
2522:       `UPDATE workspace_deployments
2523:        SET status = 'succeeded',
2524:            source_snapshot_sha256 = ?,
2525:            source_bundle_key = ?,
2526:            deployed_url = ?,
2527:            provider_deployment_id = ?,
2528:            result_json = ?,
2529:            error_code = NULL,
2530:            error_message = NULL,
2531:            finished_at = ?,
2532:            duration_ms = CASE WHEN started_at IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CAST((julianday(?) - julianday(started_at)) * 86400000 AS INTEGER) END,
2533:            updated_at = ?
2534:        WHERE id = ?
2535:          AND workspace_id = ?
2536:          AND status = 'running'
2537:          AND cancel_requested_at IS NULL`
2538:     )
2539:     .bind(
2540:       input.sourceSnapshotSha256,

2547:       updatedAt,
2548:       input.deploymentId,
2549:       input.workspaceId
2550:     )
2551:     .run();

2553:   return (result.meta?.changes ?? 0) > 0;
